tasks.subject: Task 1: Environment bootstrap + d3-sankey dependency
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A fresh worktree that runs both test suites green at today's baseline (54 unit / 25 E2E) and has `d3-sankey` installed and committed.

**Files:**
- Modify: `package.json` (d3-sankey under dependencies)
- Modify: `package-lock.json`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [x] `npm ci` and `npm install --no-save @playwright/test@1.59.1` completed without errors
- [x] Baseline unit suite: 54 passed, 4 suites
- [x] Baseline E2E suite: 25 passed (port 3000 free; Playwright auto-starts the dev server)
- [x] `d3-sankey` appears in `package.json` dependencies and `require('d3-sankey')` resolves
- [x] package.json + package-lock.json committed (16e8097)

**Verify:** `$env:CI="true"; npx react-scripts test --watchAll=false` → `Tests: 54 passed`; `npx playwright test --reporter=list` → `25 passed`

**Execution notes:** In worktrees under `.claude/worktrees/`, CRA jest needs `--testMatch "**/.claude/**/src/**/*.{spec,test}.{js,jsx,ts,tsx}"` appended (jest globs don't traverse dot-directories). Also: any later `npm install <pkg>` prunes the no-save @playwright/test — reinstall it afterwards.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["package.json", "package-lock.json"], "verifyCommand": "$env:CI=\"true\"; npx react-scripts test --watchAll=false --testMatch \"**/.claude/**/src/**/*.{spec,test}.{js,jsx,ts,tsx}\"; npx playwright test --reporter=list", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm ci and playwright install complete", "54 unit tests pass baseline", "25 e2e tests pass baseline", "d3-sankey installed and resolvable", "lockfile committed"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: sankeyTransform.js — pure graph → sankey transform (TDD)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A dependency-free `buildSankeyData(nodes, edges, {includeSubthemes})` that produces d3-sankey-ready `{nodes, links}`, an explicit Unassigned sink, a "No source" bucket, optional subtheme routing, and single-source grounding warnings.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/utils/sankeyTransform.js`
- Test: `src/utils/sankeyTransform.test.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `isEmpty: true` when there are no code nodes; empty nodes/links arrays
- [ ] Assigned code with a source yields `source → code → theme` (2 links, value 1 each); codes sharing a source reuse one source node
- [ ] Unassigned codes (including dangling `primaryThemeId`) link into `UNASSIGNED_ID` sink
- [ ] Blank/whitespace `source` buckets into `NO_SOURCE_ID`
- [ ] `warnings` contains exactly the theme ids fed by a single source bucket
- [ ] With `includeSubthemes: true`, a code with an edge to a subtheme of its own theme routes `code → subtheme → theme`; other codes stay direct; subthemes of other themes are ignored
- [ ] Every link carries `codeId`, `themeKey`, `sourceLabel`, `subId` for hover highlighting
- [ ] No d3 imports anywhere in the file
- [ ] All 11 new tests pass; suite total 65

**Verify:** `$env:CI="true"; npx react-scripts test --watchAll=false` → `Test Suites: 5 passed` / `Tests: 65 passed`

**Steps:** TDD — write the 11 tests first (full code in plan Task 2 Step 1), see them fail with "Cannot find module", implement the transform (full code in plan Task 2 Step 3), see 65 pass, commit. Transform imports only `UNASSIGNED_COLOR` from GraphContext — no d3 (CRA jest can't transform ESM-only d3).

Full code: docs/plans/2026-07-04-multi-view-phase2-sankey.md, Task 2.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/utils/sankeyTransform.js", "src/utils/sankeyTransform.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "$env:CI=\"true\"; npx react-scripts test --watchAll=false --testMatch \"**/.claude/**/src/**/*.{spec,test}.{js,jsx,ts,tsx}\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["isEmpty flag on no codes", "source→code→theme value-1 chains", "Unassigned sink incl. dangling themeIds", "No-source bucket", "single-source warnings set", "subtheme routing on/off/foreign-theme", "links carry codeId/themeKey/sourceLabel/subId", "no d3 imports", "65 unit tests pass"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: View switcher + SankeyView shell (empty state, export frame)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The toolbar offers a third "Sankey" view that mounts a SankeyView shell — empty-state guidance when no codes exist, and an empty fixed-16:10 figure frame (carrying `id="canvas-export-target"`) when data exists.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/components/sankey/SankeyView.js`
- Modify: `src/components/Toolbar.js:97` (switcher array)
- Modify: `src/App.js:26-34` (import), `src/App.js:61-63` (view comment), `src/App.js:439-462` (render branch)
- Test: `e2e/app.spec.js` (append test 26)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Toolbar shows Wall · Graph · Sankey; clicking Sankey sets `aria-pressed="true"` and mounts SankeyView
- [ ] Graph-only actions (Connect, zoom, Fit View, Align, Physics) are disabled on the Sankey view (existing `graphOnly` mechanism — no Toolbar logic changes beyond the array)
- [ ] With no codes: empty-state box with guidance text and an "⬆ Import Data" button that opens ImportModal
- [ ] With codes: a white, hard-shadowed figure frame at exactly 16:10, centered, sized to fit the panel, carrying `id="canvas-export-target"`
- [ ] E2E test 26 passes; existing 25 E2E tests still pass

**Verify:** `npx playwright test -g "Sankey view shows empty-state" --reporter=list` → `1 passed`

**Steps:** Add `['sankey', '⇶ Sankey']` to the Toolbar switcher array; create the SankeyView shell (measure-to-fit 16:10 frame + empty state — full code in plan Task 3 Step 2); wire App.js (import, three-way render ternary passing `onEditCode={setCodeEditId}` and `onImport`); append e2e test 26; run it plus the view-switcher test 22; commit.

Full code: docs/plans/2026-07-04-multi-view-phase2-sankey.md, Task 3.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/sankey/SankeyView.js", "src/components/Toolbar.js", "src/App.js", "e2e/app.spec.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx playwright test -g \"Sankey view shows empty-state\" --reporter=list", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Sankey switcher entry with aria-pressed", "graph-only actions disabled on sankey", "empty state with working Import button", "16:10 export frame with canvas-export-target id", "e2e 26 passes, 25 existing stay green"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Static Sankey rendering — layout, ribbons, labels, headers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** With data present, the figure renders the full d3-sankey diagram: column headers, ribbons in theme colors at 80% opacity with aria-labels, node bars, and side labels.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/sankey/SankeyView.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Ribbons render as `sankeyLinkHorizontal` paths, `stroke = link.color`, `strokeOpacity = 0.8`, width = layout width (min 1px)
- [ ] Every ribbon path has `role="img"` and an aria-label naming both endpoints
- [ ] Node bars: sources near-black, codes/themes/Unassigned in their node color, 1px near-black outline
- [ ] Labels: left-half nodes label to the right of the bar, right-half to the left (standard sankey rule); theme labels bold
- [ ] Column headers (SOURCES / CODES / THEMES) derived from actual layout column x-positions
- [ ] `buildSankeyData` output is never mutated — d3-sankey receives copies
- [ ] Unit + existing E2E suites stay green

**Verify:** `$env:CI="true"; npx react-scripts test --watchAll=false` → `65 passed`; manual smoke: import docs/samples/thematic-import-sample.csv, switch to Sankey → 5 sources, 10 codes, 7 themes + Unassigned (scripted in Task 7's E2E)

**Steps:** Import `{ sankey, sankeyLinkHorizontal, sankeyJustify }` from d3-sankey; add MARGIN + RIBBON_OPACITY consts; add the `layout` memo (generator fed COPIES of data.nodes/links — d3-sankey mutates) and `columns` memo; replace the empty `<svg/>` with headers + ribbon paths + node bars/labels (full JSX in plan Task 4 Step 3); run unit suite; manual smoke; commit.

Full code: docs/plans/2026-07-04-multi-view-phase2-sankey.md, Task 4.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/sankey/SankeyView.js"], "verifyCommand": "$env:CI=\"true\"; npx react-scripts test --watchAll=false --testMatch \"**/.claude/**/src/**/*.{spec,test}.{js,jsx,ts,tsx}\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ribbons at 0.8 opacity in link colors", "role=img aria-labels on all paths", "node bars styled per kind", "side labels with left/right rule", "headers from layout columns", "transform output not mutated", "65 unit tests green"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Sankey interactivity — hover highlight, tooltip, isolation, code edit
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Hovering any node or ribbon highlights the full path of the code(s) flowing through it; hovering a code shows the reused QuoteTooltip; clicking a theme isolates its flow (Escape or a pill exits); clicking a code opens CodeEditModal.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/sankey/SankeyView.js`
- Test: `e2e/app.spec.js` (append test 28)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Hovering a source / code / subtheme / theme / Unassigned bar brightens its matching ribbons (opacity 0.95) and dims the rest (0.12); non-path node bars dim to 0.25
- [ ] Hovering a code bar shows QuoteTooltip with the code's quote/source/color, tracking the cursor; leaving hides it
- [ ] Clicking a theme bar isolates its flow: non-matching ribbons drop to opacity 0.06; clicking it again, pressing Escape, or clicking the "✕ Show All Themes" pill restores everything
- [ ] Clicking a code bar calls `onEditCode(code.id)` → CodeEditModal opens
- [ ] Theme and code bars have `role="button"`, descriptive aria-labels, `tabIndex={0}`, and Enter activates them
- [ ] E2E test 28 passes; suites stay green

**Verify:** `npx playwright test -g "Sankey code click opens edit modal" --reporter=list` → `1 passed`

**Steps:** Add module-level `linkMatches(l, probe)` / `hoverProbeFor(n)` helpers; `hover` / `isolatedThemeId` / `tooltip` state; `litNodeIds` memo + `linkOpacity` / `nodeOpacity` / `handleNodeClick` / `handleCodeMouseMove`; Escape-exits-isolation effect (guarded install, per modal-Escape convention); wire the SVG node block with role="button"/aria-labels/tabIndex/Enter; add the "✕ Show All Themes" pill and the QuoteTooltip render; append e2e test 28 (seed via connect flow, isolate + un-isolate, code click → "Edit Code Node"); commit. Full JSX fragments in plan Task 5.

Full code: docs/plans/2026-07-04-multi-view-phase2-sankey.md, Task 5.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/sankey/SankeyView.js", "e2e/app.spec.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx playwright test -g \"Sankey code click opens edit modal\" --reporter=list", "acceptanceCriteria": ["path hover highlight with dimming", "QuoteTooltip on code hover", "theme isolation with pill/Escape/re-click exits", "code click opens CodeEditModal", "keyboard: role=button, tabIndex, Enter", "e2e 28 passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Grounding warnings + subtheme column toggle
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Single-source themes display a ⚠ glyph with an explanatory title, and a toggle (visible only when subthemes exist) inserts the subtheme column.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/sankey/SankeyView.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] A theme whose codes all come from one source bucket renders `⚠ <label>` with a `<title>` explaining the warning; multi-source themes render plain labels
- [ ] "Subthemes: On/Off" toggle appears top-right of the figure only when any subtheme node exists, with `aria-pressed`
- [ ] Toggling On re-lays the diagram with a SUBTHEMES header column; codes routed through subthemes show 3-link chains; hover on a subtheme highlights every thread through it (via `subId`)
- [ ] Toggle defaults to Off; unit + E2E suites stay green

**Verify:** `$env:CI="true"; npx react-scripts test --watchAll=false` → `65 passed`; manual: seed theme + subtheme + assigned code, toggle On, see the 4-column layout

**Steps:** Add `includeSubthemes` state + `hasSubthemes` derivation; feed the state into the `buildSankeyData` memo (add to deps); make `headerLabels` conditional on `columns.length === 4`; add `warn` derivation + `⚠ ${n.label}` label with `<title>` child in the node text; add the aria-pressed toggle button top-right of the frame; unit suite; manual 4-column smoke; commit. Full code fragments in plan Task 6.

Full code: docs/plans/2026-07-04-multi-view-phase2-sankey.md, Task 6.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/sankey/SankeyView.js"], "verifyCommand": "$env:CI=\"true\"; npx react-scripts test --watchAll=false --testMatch \"**/.claude/**/src/**/*.{spec,test}.{js,jsx,ts,tsx}\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["single-source themes show glyph + title", "toggle only when subthemes exist, aria-pressed", "4-column layout with subtheme routing when On", "defaults Off, suites green"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Sankey render smoke E2E, full-suite verification, docs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the post-import Sankey render smoke E2E test, prove the full unit suite (65 tests, 5 suites) and full E2E suite (28 tests) pass with all pre-existing tests green, and update CLAUDE.md.

> **USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** This task was requested by the user in the current conversation. It MUST NOT be closed by walking around it, by declaring it "verified inline", or by substituting a cheaper check. Close only after every item in `acceptanceCriteria` has been re-validated independently, with output captured.

**Files:**
- Test: `e2e/app.spec.js` (append test 27)
- Modify: `CLAUDE.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] E2E test 27 passes: after importing the sample CSV, the Sankey renders exactly 20 aria-labeled ribbon paths (10 source→code + 9 code→theme + 1 code→Unassigned), column headers, the Unassigned sink, and a ⚠-glyphed theme
- [ ] Full unit suite output captured: `Test Suites: 5 passed` / `Tests: 65 passed` — no pre-existing test broken
- [ ] Full E2E suite output captured: `28 passed` — no pre-existing test broken
- [ ] `npm run build` completes without errors (CI treats warnings as errors — catches unused imports)
- [ ] CLAUDE.md updated: view row `'wall'|'graph'|'sankey'`, Key Files entries for `sankey/SankeyView.js` + `sankeyTransform.js`, test counts (65 unit / 28 E2E), d3-sankey in the architecture table

**Verify:** `$env:CI="true"; npx react-scripts test --watchAll=false` → `Tests: 65 passed, 65 total`; `npx playwright test --reporter=list` → `28 passed`; `npm run build` → `Compiled successfully`

**Steps:** Append e2e test 27 (import sample CSV → Sankey → 20 ribbons, headers/sink/glyph assertions SCOPED to `#canvas-export-target` — unscoped getByText collides with the status bar); run it; run and CAPTURE full unit suite output; run and CAPTURE full E2E output; `npm run build`; apply the four CLAUDE.md edits (plan Task 7 Step 6); commit. Full test code in plan Task 7 Step 1.

Full code: docs/plans/2026-07-04-multi-view-phase2-sankey.md, Task 7.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["e2e/app.spec.js", "CLAUDE.md"], "verifyCommand": "$env:CI=\"true\"; npx react-scripts test --watchAll=false --testMatch \"**/.claude/**/src/**/*.{spec,test}.{js,jsx,ts,tsx}\"; npx playwright test --reporter=list; npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["e2e 27 passes with exactly 20 ribbon paths, headers, Unassigned sink, warning glyph", "unit suite output captured: 5 suites / 65 tests passed", "e2e suite output captured: 28 passed, all pre-existing green", "npm run build compiles successfully", "CLAUDE.md view row, key files, test counts, architecture table updated"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
